# THE HOUSE    STANDARD

Scroll to Enter

THE DIAGNOSTIC

## The AI    Truth Audit — $97

### Stop Losing Customers.

When someone asks Siri or ChatGPT where to grab a drink, are you the answer? Or are you invisible?

[Get The Truth →](https://lastcall.marketing/aivisibility)

#### What We Inspect:

- ●
AI Visibility ScoreDo ChatGPT, Siri, and Gemini actually recommend you?

- ●
Digital Plumbing CheckBroken links, bad hours, and data leaks killing your ranking.

- ●
Competitor Spy ReportExactly who is stealing your traffic and how they're doing it.


THE GUARANTEE: If you move forward with the Foundation Setup, the $97 is credited back 100%. You pay nothing for the truth.

SCAN

PHASE 1 / THE DIGITAL RENOVATION

### The    Foundation

WE BUILD THE MACHINE TO MAKE YOU A TOP RECOMMENDATION. STOP LOSING CUSTOMERS TO THE BAR DOWN THE STREET BEFORE THEY EVEN WALK IN.

$2,500$1,500\*

\*Partner Case Study Pricing

01

#### High-Converting Website

Custom build optimized for AEO/SEO/GEO. Show up as a Top Recommendation in AI and local search.

02

#### 2-Hour Content Studio

50 edited photos + 5 high-impact short-form videos. We make your cocktails look like $15 instead of $6.

03

#### Digital Infrastructure

Sync across Google, Yelp, Apple Maps, and 20+ local directories. Total algorithmic trust.

04

#### The Equity Vault

Custom landing page and database. You own your customers' information—not Yelp, not Instagram.

05

#### Custom Asset Design

On-brand QR designs for physical hooks that capture guest data automatically in the venue.

06

#### Missed Call Text-Back

Automated safety net. Systems texts the guest back immediately to book when you're too slammed to answer.

[Start Renovation](https://lastcall.marketing/contact)

FIX

House Rules

## Common    Questions

#### 01What is an operational audit?

A financial health check for your P&L. We identify where shrinkage or stagnant sales are leaking cash and plug the holes before scaling.

#### 02Why do I need AEO?

Traditional SEO is dead. AI engines like Perplexity and ChatGPT look for semantic data. Without AEO, you're invisible to the future of search.

#### 03Do I own my data?

100%. Unlike Yelp or Instagram, we build an Equity Vault where you own every guest contact. If you leave, you take the list with you.Make them an offer they feel stupid saying no to.

[See the full menu of questions](https://lastcall.marketing/faq)

## Pull up    a stool

The industry never sleeps, but we take appointments. Tell us what you're pouring, and we'll build the glass.
